content:
# Mean Absolute Percentage Error

**Summary**: A measure of the accuracy of a forecasting or prediction method.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] used MAPE to evaluate the performance of different AI models on raw vs. improved data.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] Standard metric for evaluating the accuracy of AI models in this study.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] Calculation based on actual vs. predicted values.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- An ANN model achieved a MAPE of 6.2% on training data using raw data. ([[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022, p. 48]])
